name: Ace Aggressor Tactics
description: The best kind of offense is those that can strike deep and hard enough that the enemy couldn't even fight back.
author: Yimie, self-proclaimed ace pilot

name: Advanced Support Doctrine
description: Our navy aviation pilots are one of the most valuable and indispensible asset a navy could have. They're irreplacable in nature, thus prioritize on their personal safety and resilience of their spacecraft for maximum survivability.
author: Captain Mizuki, Former Air Chief

name: The Queen's Resolve
description: Our Queen's absolute faith in us is the sole reason why we still exist in this ruthless Sector. Anyone who dares to harm her, lest shall face the wrath of my nuclear instrument of death. Mark my word!
author: Solvernia, Her Majesty's Royal Honor Guard, Command Flagship of the 1st November Fleet

name: The Queen's Songstress
description: I have witnessed the launch of guided munitions, and believe me, there is beauty in the sight.
author: Persephone Natasya, VAdm, ASOC

name: The Widow's Kiss
description: Some say the moment before one’s death is their life's greatest. Thus, I shall bestow all the happiness I can provide.
author: Persephone Natasya, VAdm, ASOC

name: Wits of the Silver Fox
description: Making no mistakes is what establishes the certainty of victory, for it means conquering an enemy that is already defeated.
author: Mei Yu, 'Auroran Researcher'

name: Galactic Historian
description: From Ashes of The Domain, we draw lessons, for we are the custodians of enlightenment.
author: Sophia, Seeker of Knowledge

name: Standard Automata Naval Core
description: Courtesan Type Neukos are the most mass produced model, typically used for general purposes.
author: Neuko Report #1

name: Intermediate Automata Naval Core
description: Princess Type are a slight upgrade to its predecessor, serving as a network extension to the local group.
author: Neuko Report #2

name: Advanced Automata Naval Core
description: Crown Princess Type are highly advanced and capable of being semi-autonomous. Give it the right upgrades and algorithms, it can easily imitate a human being.
author: Neuko Report #3

name: Aeronautics Specialization
description: Neukos have only been around for a few cycles at best, and they’ve already figured out how to get some more power out of the Melody Drives. And to think I’ve been working on these things for almost 30 cycles now.
author: Chief Engineer Gault, overseeing inspection of UAFX Neuxoria

name: Perseverance Drive
description: Enemy threat level lower than projected. Damage thresholds remain within acceptable parameters. Modifying engagement parameters...
author: Unit 3329 undergoing combat simulations

name: Defense Expertise
description: You wouldn't think putting a robot in charge of a ship would make it harder to kill. But something about the way they fly makes it damn near impossible to do any long-term damage to that damned thing.
author: Captain Ed Coach, overseeing combat simulations with Neuko opponents

name: Experimental Optimization
description: I dunno what the hell those robots did to my ship, but I’ve never seen it run so smoothly before. Not even when it was fresh off the line!
author: Performance report on new Neuko-led maintenance procedures

name: Weapon Calibration
description: Performance test concluded. Evaluating new weapon data... Evaluation complete. Numerous deficiencies found, beginning recalibration of all ordnance systems.
author: Unit 4020 undergoing live fire exercises

name: Assault Carrier Tactics
description: Neukos, being AI and all, are pretty rational. That doesn’t mean they don’t develop quirks. One of them hung around with the bomber pilots all day and now she's far more aggressive at exploiting holes in point defense than other units of the same model.
author: Lieutenant "Beetle" Lennon, 22nd Exoscar Torpedo Bomber Squadron

name: Support Carrier Tactics
description: You ever seen a Neuko dogfight? Slippery little things. One moment you think you have her, and the next, she’s sniping you with an autocannon.
author: Lieutenant "Aero" Smith, 6th Super Aria Fighter Squadron

name: Interception Protocol
description: Incoming contacts. Initiating threat assessment… Assessment complete, prioritize incoming missile and bomber threats. Maintain formation to ensure maximum coverage for the fleet.
author: Unit 84907, at contact with pirates on patrol

name: Command and Control Integration
description: CIC is filled with personnel dedicated to gathering intel and adapting the battle plan to the current situation. Neukos have greatly improved their performance, able to assess changing battlefields in less than a second.
author: Admiral Steiner, On Utilizing Artificial Intelligence

name: November Adaptation Module
description: The effectiveness of Neukos cannot be understated. Learning to integrate them can be an enormous boon to the fleet at large.
author: Admiral Steiner, On Utilizing Artificial Intelligence

name: Predictive Algorithms
description: I think a lot of people forget that Neukos have been predicting drunks in the red-light district for a long time now. Predicting flight paths and ballistic trajectories is so much easier than wasted gamblers.
author: Chief Roy Tibbs, 2nd turret gun captain on UAFS Typhoon

name: Electronic Warfare Suite
description: Neukos are a hivemind entity, and must be extremely resistant to EW attacks to prevent complete disruption. Knowing what they need to defend against makes them quite frightening at offensive EW as well.
author: Admiral Steiner, On Utilizing Artificial Intelligence

name: Automata Hunter-Killer Suite
description: Being able to disable automated ships is one of the best ways to deal with them. Yet Neukos have several procedures dedicated to ripping them apart. If I didn’t know better, I would think it’s a personal vendetta...
author: Comment on after-action report against automated ships

name: Alternative Plan
description: Automata ships are glass cannons. Some captains aren’t too comfortable with that, though, so they install more armor, even if it means tearing up a few flux circuits and moving a bit slower.
author: Engineering report justifying modifications made to UAFX Nevermore

name: Reserve Logistics
description: Say what you want about the Favonius guys, everybody loves having them around when they suddenly pull some vital parts out of their *****. And don’t get me started on the beer smuggling.
author: Lieutenant Dwyer, Supply Officer aboard UAFS Heiter

name: Crown Princess Neuko Core II
description: Sorceress Core is an experimental upgrade of the Crown Princess, only two were produced to pilot the namesake battlecruiser.
author: Neuko Report #4

name: Empress Neuko Core
description: Empress Type Neuko is the bleeding cutting edge of Auroran engineering, only second to the enigmatic original.
author: Neuko Report #5

name: Empirical Oversight
description: Sometimes I think Empress takes her role as “Mothership” a little too seriously. Well, as long as it brings the little ones home, I don’t think it hurts that she is a little demanding of them from time to time.
author: AER-1A, Evaluation of Novaeria's flight procedures

name: UAF Special Skills
description: United Auroran Federation unique skills.
